title: Higher-Order Operations, Map, Filter, and Fold · Pipeline Brief: Fold Invariant
summary: Summarize a stream of service records without hand-written accumulator loops. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp fold invariant increment in a tested map-filter-fold analytics pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define an accumulator identity and invariant before implementing a fold.
Design total predicates that retain records for explicit, testable reasons.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
